caption: Circular emblem with restrained floral wax-resist geometry, fine line detailing, and a deep indigo-gold luxury mood.
style_notes: Strong for premium textile marks where heritage needs to feel polished instead of rustic.
why_it_works: Memorable silhouette, controlled ornament, and clear premium positioning.

caption: Bold stamp-like emblem with imperfect carved edges, terracotta warmth, and simple botanical geometry.
style_notes: Useful when the brand should feel handmade and ownable without becoming rough or amateur.
why_it_works: The silhouette reads well while the imperfections preserve artisan credibility.

caption: Minimal linear mark inspired by woven borders, using airy spacing and a sharp editorial silhouette.
style_notes: Good for brands that need a luxury-fashion feel more than a folk-art feel.
why_it_works: Uses weaving logic subtly, which keeps the design distinct and commercially flexible.

caption: Editorial hero banner with layered textile textures, negative space, heritage framing, and controlled ornamentation.
style_notes: Works when the homepage needs cinematic richness without feeling crowded.
why_it_works: The composition creates luxury atmosphere while keeping the focal hierarchy clean.

caption: Warm hero banner built from close-up material textures, handmade surfaces, and calm layered light.
style_notes: Strong when the brand should feel tactile, warm, and rooted in making.
why_it_works: Lets materials become the hero instead of relying on generic decorative collage.

caption: High-energy hero banner with rhythmic motif bands, celebratory contrast, and controlled folk-art motion.
style_notes: For festive brands that need movement and joy without looking chaotic.
why_it_works: Keeps vibrancy structured through rhythm and panel composition.

caption: Minimal luxury banner with one focused motif, large quiet space, and subtle tactile background.
style_notes: Useful when the brand should feel premium, modern, and gallery-like.
why_it_works: Negative space creates distinction and makes the craft feel more elevated.
